name: [TEMPLATE] [competitor_gap_plugin] Competitor / SERP Gap — DataForSEO Labs → gaps → cluster/prioritize → notify

nodes.name: Spend Read
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Find Competitors

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ target: $json.__domain, location_name: $json.__location, language_name: $json.__language, limit: 5, exclude_top_domains: true, order_by: ['intersections,desc'] }]) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Domain Intersection

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__competitors || []).map((comp) => ({ target1: $json.__domain, target2: comp, location_name: $json.__location, language_name: $json.__language, intersections: false, item_types: ['organic'], limit: 200, order_by: ['keyword_data.keyword_info.search_volume,desc'] }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Spend Increment

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_window_start: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), p_channel: "dataforseo", p_sender_id: "dataforseo-daily", p_count: 1, p_spend_usd: (Number($json.__spend_delta) || 0) }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Gaps

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__rows || []).map((r) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, domain: $json.__domain, run_date: $json.__run_date, keyword: r.keyword, finding_id: r.finding_id, competitor: r.competitor, competitor_rank: r.competitor_rank, target_rank: r.target_rank, search_volume: r.search_volume, keyword_difficulty: r.keyword_difficulty, cluster_label: r.cluster_label, priority_score: r.priority_score, recommendation: r.recommendation, status: "open", evidence: { keyword: r.keyword, competitor: r.competitor, competitor_rank: r.competitor_rank, target_rank: r.target_rank, search_volume: r.search_volume, keyword_difficulty: r.keyword_difficulty, finding_id: r.finding_id } }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]
